evals.prompt: I just moved Button and Badge onto their own component-level color tokens — --button-bg/-fg/-hover and --badge-bg/-fg/-hover in components.css. Can you make sure Storybook still reflects the code? Report what's drifted first, then go ahead and apply the fixes.
evals.expected_output: Detects that the Colors catalog story is missing the new component tokens and that button.stories.tsx's CSS-variables table is stale (lists --primary instead of --button-bg); reports, then fixes both correctly.

evals.prompt: I added a `premium` variant to the Badge and created a new `Callout` component. Make sure the Storybook stories cover them. Report what's missing first, then apply the fixes.
evals.expected_output: Flags callout.tsx has no story and badge.stories.tsx is missing the premium variant; adds premium to the badge story and produces a conventional Callout story.

evals.prompt: Can you audit our Storybook and tell me if any stories have drifted from the code? We reorganized the token files into three tiers a while back and I'm not sure everything got updated. Give me a report of anything stale, then fix what you find.
evals.expected_output: Repo-wide audit that finds the button.stories CSS-variables drift, reports grouped by file, and avoids false positives on in-sync stories.
